products.name: Logitech G502 Hero
products.description: A high-performance gaming mouse featuring Logitech’s HERO sensor with up to 16,000 DPI for precise tracking. Designed for competitive gamers, it includes customizable weights, RGB lighting, and 11 programmable buttons.

products.name: Razer DeathAdder V2
products.description: An iconic ergonomic gaming mouse equipped with a 20,000 DPI optical sensor. Known for its comfortable design and durability, it’s ideal for long gaming sessions and precise control.

products.name: Logitech G Pro X Superlight
products.description: An ultra-lightweight wireless gaming mouse designed for esports professionals. Weighing under 63 grams, it delivers exceptional speed, accuracy, and lag-free performance with Logitech Lightspeed technology.

products.name: SteelSeries Rival 3
products.description: A budget-friendly gaming mouse offering accurate tracking with an 8500 DPI sensor. Its lightweight design and durable build make it a great choice for casual and entry-level gamers.

products.name: Razer BlackWidow V3
products.description: A premium mechanical gaming keyboard featuring Razer’s signature switches and customizable RGB lighting. Built for durability and responsiveness, it’s ideal for both gaming and typing.

products.name: Corsair K95 RGB Platinum
products.description: A high-end mechanical keyboard equipped with Cherry MX switches and dedicated macro keys. It features per-key RGB lighting, an aluminum frame, and advanced customization for power users and gamers.

products.name: Logitech G Pro Keyboard
products.description: A compact tenkeyless mechanical keyboard designed for esports. It features GX switches for fast actuation and a portable design perfect for competitive gaming setups.

products.name: HyperX Cloud II
products.description: A popular wired gaming headset offering virtual 7.1 surround sound for immersive gameplay. Known for its comfort and clear audio, it’s suitable for long gaming sessions.

products.name: SteelSeries Arctis 7
products.description: A premium wireless gaming headset with lossless 2.4GHz connectivity. It delivers excellent sound quality, long battery life, and a comfortable ski-goggle headband design.

products.name: Razer Kraken X
products.description: A lightweight and affordable gaming headset designed for comfort and everyday gaming. It offers clear audio and a flexible microphone, making it ideal for casual gamers.

products.name: Logitech G733 Lightspeed
products.description: A stylish wireless gaming headset featuring Lightspeed technology, RGB lighting, and DTS Headphone:X 2.0 surround sound. Designed for comfort with a lightweight build and customizable suspension headband.

products.name: Razer Basilisk X HyperSpeed
products.description: A dual-mode wireless gaming mouse with Bluetooth and HyperSpeed connectivity. It offers up to 16,000 DPI, long battery life, and an ergonomic design for comfortable extended use.
